description.definition: description of the planet shown in the observatory

gravitationalMultiplier.definition: the amount of gravity with 1 being earths gravity

earthRadiusMultiplier.definition: the planets radius relative to earthes radius

rotationAxis.definition: the axis the celestrial body curently rotates around itself

parentDimensionId.definition: what celestrial body the celestrial body schould rotate around

orbitAxis.definition: the orbit the celestrial body curently takes around its parent dimension

orbitalDistanceToParent.definition: the distance beetween the parent celestrial body and itself in AU (astronomical unit = distance beetween sun and earth)

orbitalBaseOffsetDegrees.definition: current pos in orbit in deegress

dayTimeReference.definition: the celestrial body it takes refrence from to calculate day and night time

radiationIntensity.definition: intensity on which it radiats (emissiv color and co.)

latitude_len.definition: how much you have to move in z direction to 'go around the planet' 0% = equator, 25% = South Pole, 50% = equator again, 75% = North Pole

targetDayLength.definition: negative or zero for a fixed length

atmosphereComposition.definition: Composition of the atmosphere, influences breathablility, also harvestable by gas mining

baseEnergyGain.definition: intensity on which it radiats (emissiv color and co.)

canVisit.definition: whether the player can visit the celestrial body with a rocket

canGasMine.definition: decides wether you can mine the world gas

isKnown.definition: whether the celestrial is discovered in the observatory

dataRequiredForUnlock.definition: the data needed to unlock a data in the observatory

artifactItem.definition: WIP wether the palyer has to provide an artifact to discover the celestrial body

customSeaFluid.definition: the fluid used instead of water

generateStructures.definition: wether the planet should generate any structure

biomePreset.definition: wich biome mix the celestrial body schould use (defined in config AR biome preser)

generateVolcanos.definition: wether volcanos should generate on the planet

hasCustomSky.definition: decides wether to render a custom sky based on alter values?

texture.definition: the texture used for the space rendered body model

skyColor.definition: the normal color of the sky in RGB/255

cloudColor.definition: the normal color of the clouds in RGB/255

fogColor.definition: the base color of the fog in RGB/255

sunRiseColor.definition: the normal color of the sunrise in RGB/255

reflectiveTextureTintColor.definition: which color schould be reflected how much in RGB/255

emissiveTextureTintColor.definition: the color that the body radiates outwards in RGB/255

emissiveLightColor.definition: the color that the body radiates as light outwards in RGB/255

hasRingSystem.definition: wether the celestrial body has rings

dayTime.definition: do not set (will be calculated by the game)

type.definition: what type the of celestrial body it is eg PLANET

dimensionId.definition: the id used for the dimension eg minecraft, overword structure for existing dimensions to link and adv_rocketry, name for creating a new one
